name: Shoujo
description: ~!One of the four Human Errors, demon of the fog Pandemonium which was sealed away. She takes the form of a young girl, but her true body is still inside the fog. She has lost the memories and personality from before she became a Human Error.!~

name: Ura-Acca
description: Ura-Acca, together with Acca, is responsible for leading Ai and the others to the Egg World. In contrast to Acca, Ura-Acca's speech and appearance are more laidback and informal. Sometimes, he states very pointed opinions. He is also quite honest and prefers telling the truth rather than hiding It or avoiding the subject, as Acca would. ~!Ura-Acca, along with Acca, is one of the founders of Japan Plati. name: Utakata
description: Utakata (ウタカタ) was a shinobi from Kirigakure and the jinchūriki of the Six-Tailed Slug. The Six-Tails has been captured and sealed by Akatsuki, causing this jinchūriki's death when the beast was extracted. Utakata fought using soap bubble (しゃぼん玉, shabondama) ninjutsu from the Bubble-line (バブル系, Baburu-kei) of ninjutsu. (Source: Narutopedia)

name: Xiaofei Ji
description: Xiao Fei is the son of Da Fei and adoptive son of [Dai Bo.](https://anilist.co/character/147089/Dabao-Ji) He's a flying chicken and always follows [Seven](https://anilist.co/character/147093/Liuqi-Wu) around. Dai Bo introduces Xiao Fei to Seven as a means to fly away from tough situations. Since then they are always together and Xiao Fei becomes more and more attached to Seven as he keeps helping people. Happy and innocent of the time, he can also get angry if someone he knows is hurt or in trou

name: Alice Stardia
description: __Race:__ Human Despite being Noir's younger sister, she's very possessive and protective of him, and although Alice is very popular with the opposite sex, she is only interested in Noir and has a Brother Complex.

name: Chika Amatori
description: __Height:__ 140 cm (4'5") Chika Amatori is one of the main protagonists of World Trigger. Chika is very shy, and rarely says much. She has very few friends, because she voluntarily distances herself from others. She believes that she'll just get hurt when those she gets close to get kidnapped by the Neighbors. She is really patient and serious and can concentrate very well, but she has low confidence and can't see her own potential. After meeting Yuuma and joining Tamakoma Branch, however, she s

name: Chisa
description: The owner of the restaurant Jahy works at. Her sister is the landlady of the apartment Jahy lives in. She is a nice person who cares for Jahy. She tends to call Jahy "Hy-chan," even though Jahy tells her otherwise. When she found out that Jahy can transform, she found Jahy to be even more cute. She isn't afraid of Jahy and instead sympathizes with her situation.
mediaTitles: The Great Jahy Will Not Be Defeated!
The Great Jahy Will Not Be Defeated!
searchTerms: The Great Jahy Will Not Be Defeated!

name: Eiichirou Maruo
description: A fifteen year old genius, who seems to have incredible eyesight even though he doesn't realize it at first. He decides he needs more exercise, therefore he joins a tennis club.

name: Juiz
description: Leader of the Union. Juiz is a founder and no. 1 member of the Round Table. She is determined to kill the being on the other side of Apocalypse, gathering several Negators in order to gain enough power to defeat it, thus forming The Union.

name: Kanade Ooe
description: __Height:__ 150 cm __School:__ Municipal Mizusawa High School - Year 2 Class 5 - Karuta Club accountant __Karuta Society:__ Shirohoku Society - C Class A girl with a taste for the classics, Kanade is a quiet girl who works in a kimono store and loves all kinds of traditional clothing. She is quite knowledgeable about the true meanings behind the One Hundred Poems and joins the karuta club on the condition that they start wearing hakama. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Masumi Sera
description: Masumi Sera is a self-proclaimed high school detective and practitioner of the martial art Jeet Kune Do. After making a mostly correct deduction during a murder case (it is hinted that she made a mistake on purpose), she transfers to Ran's high school class. She seems to know that Conan is a detective. Sera can fight at either the same or better level as Ran. She transfers to Ran and Sonoko's class at Teitan High. Since three years ago, she'd been living in America with her parents. She claims s
mediaTitles: Case Closed: The Sniper from Another Dimension
searchTerms: Case Closed: The Sniper from Another Dimension

name: Ranko Hata
description: Ranko Hata is the head of the school's newspaper club. She likes to take photos of the student council members to sell around the school, usually without the permission of those being photographed, and she often gets caught. name: Sora Harewataaru
description: An athletic girl from the floating kingdom in the sky, Sky Land. Sora has trained hard everyday to become a hero like the person of her dreams who saved her when she was a child. She and [Eru](https://anilist.co/character/296120/) are staying at [Mashiro](https://anilist.co/character/296118/)'s house in Sorashido City. Sora transforms into the Precure of the Sky, Cure Sky.

name: Steina
description: Steina is one of the Heavenly Kings of the Demon Army. She is the magic general.
mediaTitles: I'm Quitting Heroing: Remember, the Work Trip is First and Foremost a Learning Opportunity

name: Sui
description: __Sigil:__ Light of Pollux __Clan:__ Sunset Ravens A player in Darwin Game who has the sigil to control water. Souta's twin sister.

name: Suiryu
description: Suiryu is a Martial Artist and user of the Void Fist. He is said to be a top contender in the Super Fight tournament. Suiryu is an easygoing and carefree man usually seen smiling and is a notorious playboy, who would rather spend time with women than training. He is also very eager to fight strong opponents and believes the reason for fighting is to live an easy life without worry. During fights, Suiryu holds back in an effort to make any fight more interesting, only using his legs during his fi

name: Super Creek
description: __Height:__ 168 cm A gentle and easygoing Uma Musume and classmate of [Oguri Cap](https://anilist.co/character/96114/Oguri-Cap). She is skilled at pampering others, and is always looking out for someone. Although she hasn't achieved notable results yet compared to her classmates, glimpses of her sharp insight can be seen.

name: Takao Akizuki
description: A 15-year-old in his first year of high school. He hopes to become a shoemaker and practices on the side while he works his part-time job. His family circumstances have given him maturity beyond his years. He skips the first half of school on rainy days to think up new shoe designs in the garden. (Source: official site)

name: Tokime
mediaTitles: Fuuto PI: The Portrait of Kamen Rider Skull

name: Akane Nishino
description: __Race:__ Human Akane Nishino is the daughter of the CEO of Nishino Conglomerate and the former classmate of Minoru Kagenou, Cid's pre-reincarnated self.

description: Benisumomo is a member of Team Sheep.
